introSection: Gold Mine Coaster (Russian: ЗОЛОТОИСКАТЕЛЬ) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tale Park in Rostov-on-Don, Rostov, Russia.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.

fullText:
Gold Mine Coaster (Russian: ЗОЛОТОИСКАТЕЛЬ) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tale Park in Rostov-on-Don, Rostov, Russia.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.
